title: lithospermum × froebelii
intro: Lithospermum × froebelii, also known as Froebel's gromwell or German gromwell, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Lithospermum arvense and Lithospermum officinale. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lithospermum × froebelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Lithospermum × froebelii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
